SpTU 5, 253 [recipes][via cams/gkab]

oo NaN  (start of obverse missing)
o 1'o 1'

(o 1') [...] ... [...]

[...] x SAR KUM₂ ME ina ŠA₃ ŠEG₆šal-ma A ša₂ x [...]

(o 2') [...] ... you cook in (it) and [...] juice of ... [...]

[...] x x [...] TA KA [...] IGI [...] x [...]

(o 3') [...] ... [...] ... [...] ... [...] ... [...].

o 4'4'

[...] x ŠE.GIŠ.I₃ ta-ḫap-pap ina KEŠ₂ tara-kas₂ 3 NINDA nam-ruq ina ⸢GEŠTIN?⸣ [...]

(o 4') [...] ... you smash sesame. You bind with a band. [...] 3 akalu of namruqqu-plant in wine [...]

o 5'5'

[i]-⸢na⸣ u₂-de-e ša₂ KAŠ₃ taq-ne₂-e-ti te₁₀(DI)-ṣe-e-pir ta-[...]

(o 5') you [...] in a container of good urine ... [...].

o 6'6'

[i]-⸢na⸣ u₂-de-e 2i ša₂ KAŠ₃ ta-na-rab₄ ki-i LU ḫi-pi₂UT x [...]

(o 6') In a second container of urine you soften when ... (gloss: break) ... [...]

o 7'7'

[...]-x-mi ḪAD₂.DU ŠE.GIŠ.I₃ ta-kap-par LU BAR DUḪ.<ŠE?>.GIŠ.I₃? tal-da-[...]

(o 7') [...] ... you dry up. You peel the sesame. You [...] ... of the husk. You put [...] (and) you pound. You mix (and) press together their powder inside. You mix together ... [...] and then [...] 2 shekels of nīnû-flour, 2 shekels of aktam-flour, 1 shekel of [...] ... 1 shekel kukuru-flour, 1 shekel of pounded šunû-wood, 1 shekel of maštakal-flour [...]

o 8'8'

[...] ⸢GAR?⸣an SUD₂ si-ik-ta-šu₂-nu ina ŠA₃ a-ḫa-a-miš ḪI.ḪI ta-ṣa-ḫat x [...]

o 9'9'

[... a]-ḫa-miš ḪI.ḪI-ma 2 GIN₂ ZI₃ u₂KUR.RA 2 GIN₂ ZI₃ u₂ak-tam 1 ⸢GIN₂⸣ [...]

o 10'10'

[...] x-nu-u₂ 1 GIN₂ ZI₃ šimGUR₂.GUR₂ 1 GIN₂ ZI₃ šu!-nu-u₂ 1 GIN₂ ZI₃ ⸢IN⸣.[NU.UŠ ...]

o 11'11'

[...]-x-ta?-šu₂? GA EME₃ ana ŠA₃ ŠUBdi ina u₂-de-e ša₂ I₃.GIŠ x x [...]

(o 11') [...] you pour inside [...] ... ass's milk. In a container of oil ... [...] and you bury it. You remove it and when it is loosened, in these fringes [...] in milk [...].

o 12'12'

[...]-⸢ma?⸣ te-qeb-bir-šu₂ E₁₁-ma ki-i paṭ-ra-at ina SI-MEŠ an-na-a-tu₂ x [...]; ina GA [...]

o 13'13'

[...] x I₃.NUN ILLU UŠ₂ EREN šimḪAB 1niš ḪI.ḪI-ma ina u₂-de-e GARan ina ⸢UŠ₂?⸣ [...]

(o 13') [...] ... you mix together butter, resin, cedar sap (and) ṭūru-plant and put (them) in a container. You decoct in resin [...]. You remove and you crush in oil that you turn and you crush lard [...] whose fringe you observe. On the third day since it was packed in its surface [...] you gave him earlier [...]. You gave him [...] ... on the 5th day since the concoction which [...] from his surface. You remove as many ingredients (as there are) from (it) and 4 days [...] ... per day, you mix alum into (it), ... [...].

o 14'14'

⸢tu⸣-rab-bak IL₂-ma ina I₃.GIŠ ša₂ tu-saḫ₂-ḫi-ru u I₃.ŠAḪ tu-da-⸢aq?⸣-[qaq ...]

o 15'15'

[...] ša₂ qa-an-ni-šu₂ tam-ma-ru ina 3i u₄-mu ša₂ ina IGI-šu₂ i-kam-mi-su [...]

o 16'16'

[...] ⸢maḫ⸣-ri-i SUM-su ina 5 u₄-mu TA ŠA₃ ri-bi-ku ša₂ TA!(ŠA) qaq-qar-šu₂ [...]

o 17'17'

[...] x-ne₂-e SUM-nu-šu₂ ma-la maš-ši-ti TA ŠA₃ IL₂-ma 4 u₄-[mu ...]

o 18'18'

[...]-u₂-tu₂ ša₂ U₄ na₄gab-u ana ŠA₃ ḪI.ḪI x [...]

o 19'19'

[...] ⸢ḪI?⸣ SAḪ?-ma ti-ik-pi ina ARḪUŠ-ša₂ i-tak-kip 4 SILA₃ šal-ša₂-⸢a⸣-[tu₂ ...]

(o 19') [...] ... and she is spotted with spots on her womb: 4 qû one-third [...] ... and 15 shekels of milled peas, 2/3 mina of flesh, afterwards you cook ... [...] until it reduces to 2 qû. You put on top 4 akalu of lard, 1 akalu of oil of average quality. You pour (the ingredients) which (are) cold, and thus (is) its treatment for spots.

o 20'20'

[...] x u 15 GIN₂ GU₂.GAL sa-an-du-tu₂ 2/3 MA.NA UZU EGIR ma-ḫi-⸢u₂?⸣-tu₂ x [...]

o 21'21'

[...] ⸢ŠEG₆?šal?-u₂? EN?⸣ a-na? 2 SILA₃ GUR 4 NINDA I₃.ŠAḪ 1 NINDA I₃ gu-un-nu ana UGU GAR ša₂ tak-ṣa-⸢a?⸣-[ti? ...]

o 22'22'

ŠUB-ma DU₃-su ša₂ ti-ik-pi

o 23'23'

3 SILA₃ šal-ša₂-a-tu₂ ša₂ KAŠ ŠE SUMUN 1 GIN₂ saḫ!-le₂-e ana ŠA₃ ŠUB ⸢na₄gab?-u₂?⸣ 2 GIN₂ ŠA₂ NA ⸢1/2? SILA₃?⸣ MA [...]

(o 23') You pour inside 3 qû one-third of barley-beer, 1 shekel of cress, alum, 2 shekels of ..., 1/2 qû ... [...]. You press down inside [...] 2 shekels of opopanax. You coat the surface with 3 akalu of fat, 3 akalu of oil of average quality. The fifth (or) sixth ... [...] ... [...] ....

o 24'24'

2 GIN₂ šimḪAB ana ŠA₃ ta-se-ḫi 3 NINDA I₃.UDU 3 NINDA I₃ gu-un-nu ana IGI ŠUB 5šu₂ 6šu₂ x x [...]; ŠA₂ DU₃ [...] x IS LI IT

Reverse
r 1r 1

* MUNUS ti-ik-pi ina ARḪUŠ-ša₂ i-tak-kip 1 ⸢GIN₂?⸣ x x ⸢ŠUB?di?⸣ x ⸢GIN₂? ŠE?.GIŠ?⸣.I₃ x [...]

(r 1) (If) a woman is spotted with spots on her womb: you pour 1 shekel of ..., ... shekel(s) of sesame ... [...]. You press down [...] opopanax (and) 1/2 shekel of cedar sap in fish oil. You sink lard of ... [...]. You sprinkle the lard [...].

r 22

šimḪAB 1/2 GIN₂ UŠ₂ gišEREN ina I₃ KU₆ <<u I₃.KU₆>> te-se-eḫ-ḫi I₃.ŠAḪ ša₂ TU x x x [...]; tu-ṭa-bi I₃.ŠAḪ SU₃ [...]

r 33

* KI.MIN<(MUNUS)> ti-ik-pi ina ARḪUŠ-ša₂ i-tak-kip ḫu-um-mu-ṭu pe-ṣu-u₂ ana u₂-de-e ⸢ŠUB?di?⸣ la ba-šal te-⸢pe⸣-[eṣ ...]

(r 3) (If) ditto (a woman is spotted with spots on her womb): you throw white early-bearing palm-tree wood into a container. You crush (it) unboiled [...]. You dry (it). You dry resin in a sukku and you pound (it) with a mortar. You constantly mix (it). You pound inside. [...] in the presence of a hole, do not remove it, which is good (for) flatulence (and) spots.

r 44

ḪAD₂.DU ina suk?-ku UŠ₂ ḪAD₂!(SIG)DU-ma ina ur-ṣa SUD₂ gi-na-a ḪI la ba-šal ina ŠA₃ tu-sak [...]

r 55

ana IGI ḫur-ri la IL₂-šu₂ ša₂ TU₁₅ u ti-ik-pi SIG₅

r 66

* KI.MIN<(MUNUS)> ti-ik-pi ina ARḪUŠ-ša₂ i-tak-kip 5 GIN₂ GU₂.GAL sa-an-du-tu 2 GIN₂ u₂NU.LUḪ.ḪA u 2 GIN₂ šimMUG sa-⸢pan⸣

(r 6) (If) ditto (a woman is spotted with spots on her womb): you cook 5 shekels of milled peas, 2 shekels of asafoetida and 2 shekels of ballukku-substance from the flatland in 3 qû and one-third of old beer of barley until it reduces to 1 1/2 qû (and then) you scatter inside (it) 2 shekels of opopanax. You pour inside 4 akalu of lard (and) 2 akalu of oil of average quality. (This is) its treatment.

r 77

ina 3 SILA₃ šal-ša₂-a-tu₂ ša₂ KAŠ ŠE SUMUN ⸢ŠEG₆⸣šal EN a-na 1 1/2 SILA₃ GUR 2 GIN₂ šimḪAB ana ŠA₃ ta-ḫap-pu

r 88

4 NINDA I₃.ŠAḪ 2 NINDA I₃ gu-un-nu ana ŠA₃ ŠUB DU₃-su

r 99

* KI.MIN<(MUNUS)> ti-ik-pi ina ARḪUŠ-ša₂ i-tak-kip 5 GIN₂ GU₂.GAL sa-an-du-tu 5 GIN₂ GI SILIM sad-du 1/2 SILA₃ KAŠ!(KAŠ₃) SUMUN

(r 9) (If) ditto (a woman is spotted with spots on her womb): you cook 5 shekels of milled peas, 5 shekels of a wole reed, ground up, 1/2 qû of old beer 1 qû and one-third of old barley-beer until it is reduced to 7 akalu. you press down 3 akalu of oil of average quality, 3 akalu of lard (and) 1 shekel of opopanax. You coat its surface. You remove 4 akalu. You dry. You pour 1/2 akalu of beer on top and .... You remove 3 akalu (from) 1 shekel of kušru-plant. You dry. You pour on the top 2 akalu of kurunnu-beer of old barley-beer. (This is) its treatment.

r 1010

1 SILA₃ šal-[ša₂-a-tu₂] ša₂ KAŠ ŠE SUMUN ŠEG₆šal a-⸢di⸣ a-na 7 NINDA GUR! 3 NINDA I₃ gu-un-nu 3 NINDA I₃.ŠAḪ

r 1111

1 GIN₂ šimḪAB ⸢ina ŠA₃⸣ ta-se-ḫi ana IGI ŠUB 4 NINDA IL₂ <ḪAD₂>.DU ša₂ UGU 1/2 NINDA KAŠ ŠUB-ma BE MA? ⸢UL?⸣

r 1212

⸢1?⸣ GIN₂ ku-uz-zu₃-ru 3 NINDA IL₂ <ḪAD₂>.DU 2 NINDA ku-ru-nu ša₂ KAŠ ŠE SUMUN ana ⸢UGU⸣ ŠUB-ma DU₃-su

r 1313

6 GIN₂ GUR₂.GUR₂ 3 GIN₂ MUG 3 GIN₂ NU.LUḪ.ḪA ina 3 SILA₃ šal-ša₂-a-tu₂ ša₂ KAŠ ŠE SUMUN ŠEG₆⸢šal EN⸣

(r 13) You cook 6 shekels of kukuru-substance, 3 shekels of ballukku-substance, 3 shekels of asafoetida in 3 qû and one-third of old barley-beer until it reduces to 1 qû. Its treatment (is) 2 shekels of cumin in the lotion that you have cooked.

r 1414

a-na 1 SILA₃ GUR 2 GIN₂ ka-mun ina mar-ḫaṣ! ša₂ tu-šab-ši-lu ⸢DU₃⸣-[su]

r 1515

ana ŠA₃-TA-ša₂ 1/2! ⸢NINDA IL₂⸣ <ḪAD₂>.⸢DU⸣ 3 GIN₂ šimḪAB 5 NINDA I₃ ŠE.BARtu₂ 5 NINDA I₃.⸢ŠAḪ⸣ [...]

(r 15) You remove 1/2 akalu from each them (the treatments). You dry. [...] 3 shekels of opopanax, 5 akalu of barley oil, 5 akalu of lard [...].

r 1616

⸢ŠU?.KIN?⸣ ŠIM u 2 SES-ME ina 5 SILA₃ šal-ša₂-a-tu₂ ša₂ KAŠ ŠE SUMUN ŠEG₆šal EN [...]

(r 16) You cook reed, aromatic substance and 2 myrrh in 5 qû one-third of old barley-beer until [...] it reduces. You coat the surface with oil. Oil (is) in place of water.

r 1717

GUR I₃.GIŠ ana IGI ŠUB ku-um A-MEŠ I₃

r 1818

x ⸢SILA₃?⸣ I₃ reš-ti! 3 SILA₃ x x MI KAŠ ŠE SUMUN ŠUB ŠEG₆šal EN a-⸢na⸣ [...]

(r 18) You pour and cook ... qû of first-class oil, 3 qû ... old barley-beer until [...] to [...]

r 1919

[...] ⸢šim⸣ḪAB ZI₃ EŠ ZI₃ ŠE.BAR ZI₃ MUG sa-⸢pan⸣ ZI₃ KUR.KUR ZI₃ ak-tam ZI₃ x [...]

(r 19) opopanax [...], ... flour, barley flour, ballukku-substance from the flatland, flour, white hellebore flour, aktam-plant flour, flour of ... [...]

r 2020

[...] NU.⸢LUḪ⸣.ḪA qa-li-tu₄ ZI₃ [x]-tu₂ ⸢RI?⸣ SUMUN ana ŠA₃ ŠUB [...]

(r 20) [...] you pour inside [...] parched asafoetida [...], old ... flour. [...]

r 2121

[...] x x (x) [...]

(r 21) [...] ... [...]
